nodes.Company Description: The world's largest contract electronics manufacturer, specializing in the assembly of consumer electronics.
The world's leading pure-play semiconductor foundry, manufacturing advanced chips for global tech companies.
Provider of critical photolithography machines used in the patterning of advanced semiconductor wafers.
Leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world.
Major producer of high-purity silicon wafers and specialized chemicals for electronics.
A global leader in high-resolution display technology, specializing in OLED and AMOLED screens.
A leader in the research, development, and commercialization of phosphorescent OLED technologies and materials.
Manufacturer of specialty glass, ceramics, and related materials, specifically for industrial and scientific applications.
A provider of manufacturing equipment, services, and software to the semiconductor, display, and related industries.
Global manufacturer of ceramic-based electronic components and wireless modules.
Supplier of high-purity metals and chemical compounds for battery materials and electronic components.
Manufacturer of high-purity chemicals, silicones, and synthetic quartz.
Global supplier of functional materials including copper foil for printed circuit boards.
The world's largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry, producing Apple's A-series and M-series chips.
Leading manufacturer of photolithography systems used to etch circuit patterns onto silicon wafers.
A strategic partner providing the advanced optical systems, lenses, and mirrors used in ASML's lithography machines.
Provider of the high-power CO2 laser systems used to generate plasma for EUV light sources.
A contract manufacturer specializing in high-tech modules and systems for semiconductor equipment.
Global leader in the production of high-purity silicon wafers and photoresist materials.
A major North American subsidiary of Shin-Etsu that produces and supplies high-quality PVC resin and caustic soda.
A global leader in chemical processing providing silanes and silicon intermediates used in specialized chemical synthesis.
Major provider of ethylene and chemical monomers used as the foundation for various polymer manufacturing processes.
Provider of equipment, services, and software for the manufacture of semiconductor chips.
Leading developer and manufacturer of high-end vacuum valves for semiconductor and electronics production.
Provider of vacuum seals, quartz, and ceramic components used in high-tech manufacturing.
Global manufacturer of vacuum pumps, exhaust management systems, and abatement solutions.
A manufacturer of high-end OLED and LCD panels used in mobile devices and monitors.
Manufacturer of high-performance glass substrates for display technologies.
Global leader in materials science, providing core glass formulations and advanced manufacturing IP.
Provider of high-purity chemicals and materials for semiconductor and display fabrication.
Manufacturer of synthetic quartz and high-purity silicon materials used in high-tech manufacturing.
Developer and manufacturer of phosphorescent OLED (PHOLED) technologies and materials.
A global supplier of paints, coatings, and specialty materials that serves as the exclusive manufacturer of UDC's proprietary PHOLED materials.
A Japanese petroleum and chemical company that produces high-performance OLED host and transport materials.
A leading science and technology company providing high-purity chemicals and organic semiconductors for the electronics industry.
Supplier of equipment and software for the fabrication of semiconductor chips and display panels.
Manufacturer of vacuum seals, ferrofluidic solutions, and advanced ceramic components used in semiconductor processing chambers.
Global leader in high-performance vacuum valve technology for the semiconductor and display industries.
Design and manufacturer of critical fluid delivery subsystems for semiconductor capital equipment.
